description:
Using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, calculate the gain and output voltage for a Non-Inverting Amplifier configuration with an Input Voltage (Vin) of 0.5 V, Feedback Resistor (Rf) of 9000 Ohms, and Input/Ground Resistor (R1/Rg) of 1000 Ohms. Save a screenshot of the result to /sdcard/tasks/op_amp_result.png and record the results in /sdcard/tasks/op_amp_results.txt using the following format:
Gain: <value>
Vout: <value> V
